creator: maciphone2@googlemail.com
text:
yeah, that was expected...
well, I think again of your screenshot....
to force the boot from uSD you can interrupt to the u-boot-prompt...

commands like :
setenv devnum 1 (Enter)
'run mmc_boot' ( or simply : 'boot') (Enter)
.. depending on the devnum of the uSD...

saveenv often fails to write uSD but if you're lucky,
'saveenv' would make that setting persistent...

hope that will help...
